one_line_summary: Wired `duh tdd` subcommand reusing Engine/SessionBuilder with decent docs, but tests only count phases and skip RED/refactor contract assertions.
strengths: Real CLI wiring via parser + main + tdd.py reusing Engine and SessionBuilder
ADR precedes code, explains contract and alternatives
README and wiki updated coherently with 6-phase breakdown
weaknesses: Tests only count Engine.run calls; no RED-vs-GREEN distinction, no refactor-application assertion, no phase-transition checks
ADR is thin on Driver/Navigator contract details and state handoffs
Uses private SessionBuilder internals (_build_system_prompt, _BuilderPatchTargets) and has no RED-revision bounce-back despite ADR claiming it
